PROP-01b-partial1-post-003.text: After bid() completes, s_entered must be reset to false regardless of callback success or failure.
PROP-01b-partial1-post-003.assertion: forall bid(asset,amt,data): post: s_entered == false (reset in all execution paths)

locations.note: s_entered = false reset at line 457; no try/catch — revert in callback leaves s_entered = true
